esearchresult.querytranslation: (("warfarin"[Title/Abstract] OR "anticoagulant*"[Title/Abstract] OR "anticoagulation"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("omega-3"[Title/Abstract] OR "fish oil"[Title/Abstract] OR "EPA"[Title/Abstract] OR "DHA"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("bleeding"[Title/Abstract] OR "hemorrhage"[Title/Abstract] OR "INR"[Title/Abstract] OR "international normalized ratio"[Title/Abstract])) NOT "rodenticide"[Title/Abstract]
